beer.beer_description:
There was no better way to close out the year than a big, bold West Coast collab. For this release, we leaned heavily into traditional, heavy-hitting US hops to provide a sturdy backbone before layering in Nelson to brighten the whole profile.
The result is a beer that is dank with a 'chewy' assertive bitterness, there is no question you're drinking a Westy here. On the nose and palate, you'll find heaps of grapefruit and blood orange, all finishing with that signature piney and herbal character we all love

Nelson | CTZ | Chinook

Collab w/ Kicks

items.badge_description: Canning is all the rage and it's not hard to see why - travels well, more environmentally friendly, and no need to carry your bottle opener. That's 380 checkins with the serving style of Can. Try 5 more for Level 77! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

items.checkin_comment: Chewy caramel base, loads of piney oils with stone fruit and orange. Good bitterness too!

items.badge_description: It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That’s 20 check-ins with a photo.
